text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Is this... an error? In that case...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Increased heart rate and tightness in chest
detected. I have determined that I am in an
abnormal state of stimulation.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Based on this, I believe I am "trembling with
excitement."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...I will definitely win this race, Trainer.
